feature: Add Diet Type and Meals Per Day UI panels to Settings Profile section

prompts.description: Add Diet Type and Meals Per Day inline selection panels to Settings Profile section
prompts.prompt: In components/settings-screen.tsx, add two new settings-section-panel blocks to the Profile Card section, following the exact same pattern as the existing 'Goal' and 'Activity level' panels. 1. Find the Activity level panel (search for 'Activity level'). After its closing tag and before the next sibling section, insert two new panels: Panel A — Diet Type: - Label: 'Diet type' - Description: 'Controls the type of meals generated in your plan.' - Render dietTypes array as choice cards (same pattern as goals/activityLevels) - selected = userProfile.dietType === item.id - onClick: updatePreferences({ dietType: item.id }) - Use dietTypes array that already exists in the file Panel B — Meals Per Day: - Label: 'Meals per day' - Description: 'How many meals to split your daily calories across.' - Render [3, 4, 5] as a row of 3 buttons (not a grid — use flex flex-row gap-2) - Each button: selected = userProfile.mealsPerDay === n, onClick: updatePreferences({ mealsPerDay: n }) - Style: use the same settings-choice-card classes for selected/idle states, h-12 w-full 2. Do not touch editDietType or editMealsPerDay state — those are for the body stats form. These new panels use updatePreferences() directly, same as Goal and Activity level. 3. Do not change any other logic or sections.
